epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: EWGSOP2: grip strength, muscle mass (DXA/BIA), and performance (gait speed/SPPB)

publicHealthSystem.screeningCoverage: variable; geriatric assessment pathways exist in many systems
publicHealthSystem.estimatedPatients: tens of millions of older adults
publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate to high with access to structured rehab and nutrition support

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Broader access to DXA/BIA and rehab services in many member states
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Resistance training, nutrition/protein optimization, vitamin D when indicated, and multidisciplinary geriatric care
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Established rehabilitation and geriatric care pathways in many systems
